metrics.phase1_conclusion: All 16 pre-April events stop at ARCH_ZONE. March OI spikes (5-10%) insufficient to trigger REAL_DUMP. Pattern requires extreme OI (>50% for KOMA at 160%+).
metrics.verdict: SELECTIVE — pattern fires only on liquidation cascade events (OI >50%). Not a broad market pattern. Selectivity is a feature (fewer false positives). KOMA live entry signal active.
